title: Stepmom
desc: A fashion photographer tries to get close to her boyfriend's children and ex-wife.

title: The Great Gatsby
desc: Nick gets interested in the exuberant life of Jay Gatsby, a mysterious millionaire.

title: Angels & Demons
desc: Robert Langdon, a symbologist, tries to stop a secret society from attacking the Vatican.

title: The Big Short
desc: A few shrewd but oddball fund managers and traders bet against the US mortgage system's stability.

title: Knives Out
desc: When a renowned novelist passes unexpectedly, a detective uncovers family secrets.

title: Erin Brockovich
desc: Erin Brockovich builds a case against a power company that pollutes a town's water supply.

title: Revolutionary Road
desc: A near-perfect couple's relationship gets strained when their plan to move to Paris fails.

title: Serena
desc: The life of George, a timber baron, turns upside down when he marries Serena.

title: Shaan-The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations. S03 E01.

title: Benny Dayal-The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations. S03 E09.

title: The Da Vinci Code
desc: Langdon and Sophie follow clues hidden on Da Vinci paintings to expose a well-kept secret.

title: Speed Kills
desc: A wealthy speedboat racer's secret life lands him in trouble with law enforcement and drug lords.

title: The Frozen Ground
desc: A young woman who escapes from a serial killer helps the police in tracking him down.

title: The Fugitive
desc: A man wrongly accused of killing his wife races to find the real killer.

title: Spotlight
desc: Four journalists pursue a story about child molestation charges against a local church.

title: Julie & Julia
desc: Though separated by time, Julia and Julie's passion for food intertwines their lives.

title: The Pursuit of Happyness
desc: Chris has to deal with the financial crisis and his son's custody after his wife leaves.

title: The Company You Keep
desc: Grant, a wanted man, is forced to go on the run after a journalist reveals his identity.

title: The Pianist
desc: A Jewish musician's entitled lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany.

title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
desc: A fading actor and his stunt double struggle to restart their Hollywood careers.

title: King Richard
desc: Richard Williams goes to great lengths to help his daughters become tennis champions.
